'''âh-sh-sh''' ('''kahashash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pollack|pollack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-sh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pollack|pollack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-sh-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kahashash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihashash|thihashash]] || [[word:jihashash|jihashash]] || [[word:shihashash|shihashash]] || [[word:kihashash|kihashash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhashash|thuthuhashash]] || [[word:jujuhashash|jujuhashash]] || [[word:shushuhashash|shushuhashash]] || [[word:kukuhashash|kukuhashash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhashash|thuhashash]] || [[word:juhashash|juhashash]] || [[word:shuhashash|shuhashash]] || [[word:kuhashash|kuhashash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhashash|thuhashash]] || [[word:juhashash|juhashash]] || [[word:shuhashash|shuhashash]] || [[word:kuhashash|kuhashash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehashash|thehashash]] || [[word:jehashash|jehashash]] || [[word:shehashash|shehashash]] || [[word:kehashash|kehashash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohashash|thothohashash]] || [[word:jojohashash|jojohashash]] || [[word:shoshohashash|shoshohashash]] || [[word:kokohashash|kokohashash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohashash|thohashash]] || [[word:johashash|johashash]] || [[word:shohashash|shohashash]] || [[word:kohashash|kohashash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohashash|thohashash]] || [[word:johashash|johashash]] || [[word:shohashash|shohashash]] || [[word:kohashash|kohashash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhashash|thĂŠhashash]] || [[word:jĂŠhashash|jĂŠhashash]] || [[word:shĂŠhashash|shĂŠhashash]] || [[word:kĂŠhashash|kĂŠhashash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahashash|thathahashash]] || [[word:jajahashash|jajahashash]] || [[word:shashahashash|shashahashash]] || [[word:kakahashash|kakahashash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahashash|thahashash]] || [[word:jahashash|jahashash]] || [[word:shahashash|shahashash]] || [[word:kahashash|kahashash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahashash|thahashash]] || [[word:jahashash|jahashash]] || [[word:shahashash|shahashash]] || [[word:kahashash|kahashash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahashash|shahashash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahashash|goshahashash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahashash|gokishahashash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahashashnĂŒ|shahashashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahashashnknĂŒ|goshahashashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashashnĂŒ|gokishahashashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahashashĂ«|shahashashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahashashnkshĂ«|goshahashashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahashashĂ«|gokishahashashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashashro|shahashashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashashnkro|goshahashashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashashro|gokishahashashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashashmu|shahashashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashashnkmu|goshahashashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashashmu|gokishahashashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahashasher|shahashasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahashashnksher|goshahashashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahashasher|gokishahashasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahashashng|shahashashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahashashnkng|goshahashashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahashashng|gokishahashashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahashashya|shahashashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahashashnkya|goshahashashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahashashya|gokishahashashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahashashyam|shahashashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahashashnkyam|goshahashashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahashashyam|gokishahashashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahashashnĂŒshĂ«|shahashashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahashashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshahashashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahashashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishahashashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashashnĂŒro|shahashashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashashnknĂŒro|goshahashashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashashnĂŒro|gokishahashashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashashnĂŒmu|shahashashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashashnknĂŒmu|goshahashashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashashnĂŒmu|gokishahashashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahashashĂ«nĂŒ|shahashashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahashashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahashashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahashashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashashĂ«ro|shahashashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashashnkshĂ«ro|goshahashashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashashĂ«ro|gokishahashashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashashĂ«mu|shahashashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashashnkshĂ«mu|goshahashashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashashĂ«mu|gokishahashashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahashashronĂŒ|shahashashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahashashnkronĂŒ|goshahashashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashashronĂŒ|gokishahashashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahashashroshĂ«|shahashashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahashashnkroshĂ«|goshahashashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahashashroshĂ«|gokishahashashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashashromu|shahashashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashashnkromu|goshahashashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashashromu|gokishahashashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahashashmunĂŒ|shahashashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahashashnkmunĂŒ|goshahashashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashashmunĂŒ|gokishahashashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahashashmushĂ«|shahashashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahashashnkmushĂ«|goshahashashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahashashmushĂ«|gokishahashashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashashmuro|shahashashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashashnkmuro|goshahashashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashashmuro|gokishahashashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
